channel.title: Arcane City Events - Next 14 Days
channel.description: Upcoming Arcane City events from 2026-07-06 through the next 14 days.

item.title: [07/06] Neurodivergent Social Mixer @ Belvederes
item.description:
A free neurodivergent social mixer at Belvedere’s Ultra Dive, 7–10pm.

Venue: Belvederes

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/06] DOLLAR MONDAY feat. Compandas (Record Release Show) + Phloc @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
Free Show. $1 Beer. Punk/Indie at Bottlerocket

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/07] Alamoans, High Ideals, Wasted Boys, The Kron @ 40th Street Bridge Park
item.description:
A raw punk and rock show featuring Alamoans, High Ideals, Wasted Boys, and The Kron under the 40th Street Bridge in Pittsburgh.

Venue: 40th Street Bridge Park

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/07] Story Club PGH Presents: Story Slam! (Breaking Point) @ City of Asylum
item.description:
Share the story of when you reached your Breaking Point this July at Story Club PGH’s Story Slam, for the chance to win prizes and storytelling glory!

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/07] Three Holes Goes to Hollywood @ Glitterbox Theater
item.description:
A guest clown show from Philly by Mitchell Ryan, performed at Glitterbox Theater.

Venue: Glitterbox Theater

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/08] Artist in Exile: Mai Khôi & the Dissidents (Vietnamese Pop) @ City of Asylum
item.description:
Award-winning singer, composer, and activist Mai Khôi and her group the Dissidents, featuring Mark Michelli, Jeff Siegfried, Eli Namay, and PJ Roduta, take to the Alphabet City stage for a farewell concert.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/08] Something Missing with Heading North, Jade Eye & Print! @ Roboto Project
item.description:
Something Missing headlines a multi-act night at Mr. Roboto Project with Heading North and Jade Eye &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Print!

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/08] Foxes at 3am / Sherry CD-ROM / Almost Exactly Like Julia @ Poetry Lounge
item.description:
Three acts — Foxes at 3am, Sherry CD-ROM, and Almost Exactly Like Julia — perform live at the Poetry Lounge in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Poetry Lounge

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/08] Ray Keith: Dread Recordings @ Side Quest
item.description:
Drum &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; bass legend Ray Keith of Dread Recordings plays Side Quest in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Side Quest

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/08] Churches and Trains at Dad's Backyard @ Dad&amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s Backyard at 40th Street Bridge Park
item.description:
Churches and Trains with local support from Crisp Lake, Jack Hell, and More!

Venue: Dad&amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s Backyard at 40th Street Bridge Park

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/09] Thursday Night Jazz: Kente Summer Madness Presents the Mark Strickland Quartet @ City of Asylum
item.description:
Mark Strickland kicks off the three-part Kente Summer Madness jazz series, leading a killer quartet this summer at City of Asylum.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/09] Geña y Peña: Boleros y Música Cortavenas @ La Palapa
item.description:
Geña y Peña perform an intimate evening of boleros and romantic Latin music at La Palapa.

Venue: La Palapa

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/09] Willis: Live '26 Tour @ Thunderbird
item.description:
Willis brings their Live '26 Tour to Thunderbird Music Hall on July 9th, 2026, with local support.

Venue: Thunderbird

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/09] Hannah Juanita, Mose Wilson & Ramona and the Holy Smokes @ Club Cafe
item.description:
A Country &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; Western night at Club Cafe featuring Hannah Juanita, Mose Wilson, and Ramona &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; The Holy Smokes.

Venue: Club Cafe

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/09] Grocer w/ Sorry Face + Lace Boys @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
Punk/Alternative Show at Bottlerocket

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/09] Midnight Stereo @ Poetry Lounge
item.description:
Poetry Lounge presents Midnight Stereo, a late-night DJ event featuring Cryptid Yinzer and Frosty Dub.

Venue: Poetry Lounge

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/09] Nu Metal Night @ Belvederes
item.description:
Nu Metal Night with DJ Just Vince at Belvedere’s Ultra Dive.

Venue: Belvederes

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] North Side Music Festival @ The Government Center
item.description:
A three-day outdoor music festival on Pittsburgh's North Side, July 10–12, 2026.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] The House Center @ The Government Center
item.description:
A free all-night house music event at The Government Center as part of Northside Fest, featuring DJ Scotty C, ProdByAJ, Dex, and Champs.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] Fill the Bukit! @ Glitter Box Theater (Homestead)
item.description:
A benefit show for Bukit Bail Fund

Venue: Glitter Box Theater (Homestead)

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] The BedHeads, Wizards Is Crazy, Shakira Chenchilla at Mr. Roboto Project @ Mr. Roboto Project
item.description:
A three-band indie/DIY rock show at Mr. Roboto Project featuring The BedHeads, Wizards Is Crazy, and Shakira Chenchilla.

Venue: Mr. Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] The Michael Character, Crisp Lake, Lawn Care at Teamster Hall 636 @ Teamster Hall 636
item.description:
Historiographical Punk, Mathy Ska and Blackened Ska Folk at the Teamster Hall Local 636

Venue: Teamster Hall 636

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] Live in The Lobby: smoko.world & Beaksides @ Field Day
item.description:
smoko.world and Beaksides perform live at The Lobby Bar on Friday, July 10th.

Venue: Field Day

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] Sherlock Holmes and the Web of Deceit @ Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center
item.description:
The Pittsburgh Savoyards present a theatrical adaptation of Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's Sherlock Holmes, adapted by Robert Hockenberry, running July 10–26, 2026.

Venue: Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] Pittsburgh Honky Tonk 90s Night featuring Jon Bindley & The Steel Cowboys @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
A calender of events, concerts, club nights, weekly and monthly events series, promoters, artists, producers, djs, venues and other entities.

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] Kumarion @ Side Quest
item.description:
Kumarion headlines Sidequest on 44th with support from Kilo, Mike V, and Drucifer.

Venue: Side Quest

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] Dark Room w/ Erica Scary
item.description:
A goth/industrial dark alternative dance night presented by The Kult at SideQuest.

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] SPIN @ The Eagle
item.description:
Monthly Dance Experience featuring 11 DJs and producers for a 6-hour night of electronic music.

Venue: The Eagle

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/10] Body Check @ Belvederes
item.description:
Body Check — a Heated Rivalry dance party at Belvedere’s Ultra Dive.

Venue: Belvederes

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/11] 412 Sound Clash Under the Bridge @ Ask a punk
item.description:
A free outdoor EDM vs Hip-Hop DJ battle event under the bridge in Braddock, PA.

Venue: Ask a punk

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/11] Bloodrave: Daywalker Party @ Ask a punk
item.description:
A goth, techno, and industrial rave under the Homestead Bridge featuring DJs, guitars, dancers, and freaks.

Venue: Ask a punk

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/11] Pet Peeves / Negligible Wound x Slacking / That Like This / Johnny Arlett @ Maple Leaf
item.description:
A night of no-wave, noise, and improvised music at The Maple Leaf in Millvale featuring four acts including Chicago's Pet Peeves.

Venue: Maple Leaf

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/11] Wage Cage, Placid State, Gruitus, Geese Teeth @ 222 Ormsby
item.description:
A four-band underground rock show at 222 Ormsby in Pittsburgh for $10.

Venue: 222 Ormsby

View event on Arcane City

item.description:
A fundraising benefit event for Kelly Strayhorn Theater in Pittsburgh.

item.title: [07/11] Sherlock Holmes and the Web of Deceit @ Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center
item.description:
The Pittsburgh Savoyards present a theatrical adaptation of Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's Sherlock Holmes, adapted by Robert Hockenberry, running July 10–26, 2026.

Venue: Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center

item.title: [07/11] The Guatemalan Handshake: 20th Anniversary Screening @ Harris Theater
item.description:
A rare 20th anniversary screening of Todd Rohal's cult indie film on the only existing 35mm print, presented by Keylight.

Venue: Harris Theater

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/11] Fringe Country @ Club Cafe
item.description:
A night of fem-led country music from traditional to fringe, presented by Women of Country PGH at Club Cafe.

Venue: Club Cafe

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/11] Mayreh & Hemlock for Socrates @ The Government Center
item.description:
A live music double bill featuring Mayreh and Hemlock for Socrates at Government Center in Pittsburgh.

Venue: The Government Center

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/11] Sadderday @ Belvederes
item.description:
Sadderday — the return of Emo Night with DJ ADMC at Belvedere’s Ultra Dive.

Venue: Belvederes

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/11] HEX APPEAL X BLOODRAVE: THE AFTERS @ Club Pittsburgh
item.description:
THE OFFICIAL BLOODRAVE AFTER PARTY

Venue: Club Pittsburgh

item.title: [07/12] Pittsburgh Jazz Listening Session @ Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)
item.description:
Vinyl listening session of classic Pittsburgh jazz recordings.

Venue: Carnegie Library of Pittsburgh - Main (Oakland)

item.title: [07/12] Sherlock Holmes and the Web of Deceit @ Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center
item.description:
The Pittsburgh Savoyards present a theatrical adaptation of Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's Sherlock Holmes, adapted by Robert Hockenberry, running July 10–26, 2026.

Venue: Margaret Partee Performing Arts Center

item.title: [07/12] Sunday Shift: Ivory @ The Distillery Complex
item.description:
Longturn Music presents an open-air rooftop party featuring headliner Ivory (Afterlife/Diynamic/Innervisions) with Koopmusik, Jen Núñez, and Mem_Ary at The Distillery Complex in Pittsburgh.

Venue: The Distillery Complex

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/12] PGHwrites: Sarah Valentine’s “Decoding the Devil: Black Women Codebreakers and the Secret War Against Stalin’s Bomb” (Book Launch) with Tahirah J. Walker
item.description:
In a new work as groundbreaking as “Code Girls” and “Hidden Figures,” author Sarah Valentine unearths the true story of Black cryptologists’ critical contributions to national security during the civil rights era.

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/12] Reiki + Drone (First Light Reiki, and How Things Are) Session One @ Navushouse
item.description:
Reiki session with live ambient drone music

Venue: Navushouse

View event on Arcane City

item.description:
Reiki session with live ambient drone music

Venue: Navushouse

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/12] Y2K Art & Vintage Market + Movie Screening @ Bakery Square
item.description:
A blast from the past movie night market!

Venue: Bakery Square

item.description:
Longer form improv from the OIL community

Venue: Bantha Tea Bar

item.title: [07/12] Bill Nace and Twig Harper with Boydozer and Dana Ma + Anthony D-L @ Brillobox
item.description:

item.title: [07/13] Revival Choir / The Give and Take / Vinny Palese @ Roboto Project
item.description:
A live music showcase featuring Revival Choir, The Give and Take, and Vinny Palese at The Mr. Roboto Project.

Venue: Roboto Project

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/13] Chamber Music Pittsburgh Presents: The Cowboy Evolves — Journeys Through the Music of the Americas @ City of Asylum
item.description:
This Pittsburgh Performs concert, curated by Carlos Clark, features music by composers from the US, Uruguay, and Brazil, offering a vibrant vision of discovery while simultaneously reflecting on the complex history of the Americas.

Venue: City of Asylum

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/15] Memphis May Fire with Caskets, If Not For Me, and Royale Lynn @ Roxian Theater
item.description:
Memphis May Fire headlines a heavy metal night at Roxian Theatre with support from Caskets, If Not For Me, and Royale Lynn.

Venue: Roxian Theater

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [07/15] Sweet Abyss w/ Gusto, VIII Dorsey, Lemonline @ Bantha Tea Bar
item.description:

Venue: Bantha Tea Bar

item.description:
